steps.title: Identify the initial moment
steps.content: From which the egg was thrown refers to time $t = 0$, the initial moment when the egg leaves the rooftop.

steps.title: Evaluate the equation at t = 0
steps.content:
Substitute $t = 0$ into $h = -4.9t^2 + 9t + 18$:
$$h = -4.9(0)^2 + 9(0) + 18 = 18$$The initial height is 18 meters.
